title: Rules and regulations impairing provisions prohibited
doc_html:
§494.  Rules and regulations impairing provisions prohibited

Nothing contained in the Revised Statutes of Louisiana shall be construed as conferring upon any parish school board the authority to make rules and regulations which may impair or nullify the provisions of this Sub-part.
